title: Flat Lay of Zero Waste Lifestyle Essentials on Linen Fabric
description: A flat lay composition of eco-friendly zero waste lifestyle essentials arranged on a natural linen fabric background. Items include bamboo toothbrushes, metal reusable straws with cleaning brush, reusable cloth bags, glass jars filled with lentils, oats, almonds, pumpkin seeds, and sunflower seeds, and beeswax food wraps. The image features natural colors, sharp focus, and even lighting, emphasizing sustainable and plastic-free household products.
